chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.Nos.D-1628 & 1629 of 2021 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For order on office objection. 2.For hearing of CMA No.6955/2021 3.For hearing of main case. 15.05.2025 M/s.Sardar M. Ishaque & Waqar Ahmed, Advocates for the Petitioners. Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Aqeel Qureshi, Advocate for Respondent. Pursuant to order dated 12.5.2025 Mr.Aqeel Qureshi, learned counsel states that the license of the petitioner is valid. Under such circumstances, no case is articulated to perpetuate this petition, which is disposed of as having become infructuous. Let copy of this order be placed in connected petition. Judge Judge nasir
